ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "index_link" TEXT /* Link to the organization's profile on the ACNC website */,
  "legal_name" TEXT /* Legal name of the organization */,
  "town_suburb" TEXT /* Town or suburb where the organization is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the organization is based */,
  "status" TEXT /* Registration status of the organization (e.g., Registered) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the organization (e.g., Small, Large) */,
  "abn" TEXT /* Australian Business Number (ABN) of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Annual revenue of the organization */,
  "expenses" INTEGER /* Annual expenses of the organization */,
  "causes" TEXT /* Causes supported by the organization */,
  "last_report_date" TEXT /* Date of the last financial report submitted by the organization */,
  "religious_ref" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the organization is religiously affiliated (0 for no, 1 for yes) */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the organization was established */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the organization */,
  "postal_address" TEXT /* Postal address of the organization */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the organization's location */,
  "org_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organizations_org_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_type_id") REFERENCES org_types ("org_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Annual revenue reported in the financial report */,
  "expenses" INTEGER /* Annual expenses reported in the financial report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the financial report document */,
  "financial_year" TEXT /* The financial year the report belongs to */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit (e.g., Audited, Not Audited) */,
  "report_submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cause */,
  "cause_category" TEXT /* Category of the cause (e.g., Health, Education, Environment) */,
  "parent_cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent cause (for hierarchical cause relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "org_causes" (
  "org_cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization-cause relationship */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cause */,
  "support_level" TEXT /* Level of support provided by the organization for the cause (e.g., Primary, Secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_org_causes_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES causes ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_org_causes_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Organization, Public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., View Financial Reports, Edit Organization Details) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "org_types" (
  "org_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization type */,
  "org_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization type (e.g., Charity, Non-Profit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_type_id")
)
